news_bbc.title: Power banks and vapes now biggest fire risk on planes
news_bbc.summary: Lithium battery fires are the number one safety risk to aircraft, yet the number of devices found in hold bags has nearly doubled in a year.

news_bbc.title: Yes, there have been rows but here's how I've made moving back home work
news_bbc.summary: Rising costs are forcing more young adults to live with their parents, here's how not to come to blows.

news_bbc.title: Asia stock markets slide as tech shares slump
news_bbc.summary: Trading on South Korea's Kospi index was halted for the third time this week to prevent panic selling.

news_bbc.title: Teens who hacked TfL were known to police years before cyber-attack
news_bbc.summary: Owen Flowers and Thalha Jubair were convicted for their roles in the attack, which led to large costs for Transport for London.

news_bbc.title: Apple hikes some prices by nearly 20% while Xbox raises console cost
news_bbc.summary: Apple said it had "never seen a component price increase this much, this quickly".

news_bbc.title: The abundant but expensive energy source that's under your feet
news_bbc.summary: Start-ups are taking fresh approaches to geothermal energy, but will the economics work?

news_bbc.title: Ryanair says it will reluctantly not charge parents to sit next to children
news_bbc.summary: The airline had typically charged adults a fee of £8 each way to sit with their young children.

news_bbc.title: How you can save money on your energy bill as debts rise
news_bbc.summary: Experts say support is available as total debt and arrears to suppliers hit a new record.
